title: Programmer Art Ghasts
body:
The new look of ghasts looks strange,so I made this resource pack to give ghasts a classic look.  
I also changed the texture of happy ghasts like this to match classic ghasts.
![A classic-look happy ghast flying in the sky](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7fa20cc08459b8f4ad3943890b3f22f37e54b49.png)
